mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sample_detect_item WHERE sample_id = #{sampleId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC
mapper.delete: UPDATE sample_detect_item SET deleted = 1 WHERE sample_id = #{sampleId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sample_detect_item (sample_id, sample_code, detect_item_id, detect_item_name, limit_standard_id, sort, deleted, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.sampleId}, #{item.sampleCode}, #{item.detectItemId}, #{item.detectItemName}, #{item.limitStandardId}, #{item.sort}, 0, NOW())
